---
title: "Professional Activities"
---

## Consulting

<!-- List your consulting areas. Example:

I provide consulting services in the following areas:

- **Psychometric analysis**: Scale development, validation, and adaptation. IRT and CFA-based item analysis. Reliability and validity assessment.
- **Organizational diagnosis**: Design and implementation of organizational assessments, climate surveys, and HR analytics.
- **Personnel selection**: Development and validation of selection instruments. Adverse impact analysis and fairness evaluation.
- **Research methodology**: Study design, sample size planning, advanced statistical modeling (SEM, IRT, meta-analysis).

For inquiries, please [contact me](contact.qmd).

-->

*Consulting areas will be listed here shortly.*

---

## Editorial & Peer Review

I serve as a peer reviewer for multiple international journals. 

<!-- List journals here. Example:

- *Journal of Organizational Behavior*
- *European Journal of Psychological Assessment*
- *Psykhe*
- *Revista de Psicología del Trabajo y de las Organizaciones*

-->

---

## Professional Memberships

<!-- Example:

- Sociedad Chilena de Psicología del Trabajo y las Organizaciones (SCPTO)
- European Association of Work and Organizational Psychology (EAWOP)

-->

---

## Conference Presentations

<!-- Example:

### Dark Triad Traits and Self-Favoring Pay Allocation in Team Leadership Contexts
**Event**: ECP22 — European Congress of Psychology (2025)  
**Format**: Poster presentation

-->

*Selected conference presentations will be listed here.*
